title: claim.evidence.versioned.v1 payload
description: Payload of the claim.evidence.versioned.v1 event — notification that a claim/evidence ledger version was produced by claim-evidence-service. Thin notification projection; the full claim/evidence graph itself is owned/stored by claim-evidence-service (see domain/extracted-claim, domain/evidence-record), not carried here.
$comment: compat_class: open (event payload, ADR-0012/ADR-0024). Authority: docs/architecture/wave4-plan.md 'Existing vs new events' (w4-10 Contracts Steward deliverable — 'claim.evidence.versioned.v1' listed as NEW), satisfying events/catalog/README.md's 'Finalize PROPOSED topics via ADR before implementation' obligation via the Wave 4 authority doc. Producer claim-evidence-service (services/intelligence/claim-evidence-service/README.md 'Published events: claim.evidence.versioned.v1 (PROPOSED)'); consumes site.inventory.completed.v1, demand.graph.versioned.v1, entity.graph.versioned.v1. Shape mirrors the demand/entity '<domain>.graph.versioned.v1' notification family, adapted to the claim-evidence ledger's two owned counts (claim_count, evidence_count) per contract-catalog.md P1 rows 'ExtractedClaim'/'EvidenceRecord'.

project_id.$comment: core business identifier (api-event-contracts.md); claim/evidence ledger is project-scoped, consuming demand-graph/entity-graph's project-scoped output.

ledger_version.$comment: Opaque version token for this claim/evidence ledger snapshot — named ledger_version (not graph_version) per services/intelligence/claim-evidence-service/README.md 'Bounded context: Claim–evidence ledger'.

claim_count.$comment: Number of extracted claims (contract-catalog.md 'ExtractedClaim') in this ledger version.

evidence_count.$comment: Number of evidence records (contract-catalog.md 'EvidenceRecord') in this ledger version.

provenance_ref.$comment: Content-addressed hash anchoring the ledger version's build provenance (sole ledger anchor, mirrors repo-intaken.content_hash / demand-graph-versioned.provenance_ref).
